# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    parameters {
        string(name: 'source_url', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of build artifact to download')
        string(name: 'destination_path', defaultValue: '/path/to/destination', description: 'Path to deploy the artifact')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifact = new File(params.destination_path)
                    def url = params.source_url
                    downloadFile(url, artifact.absolutePath)
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Logic to deploy the artifact to production servers
                    // ...
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```
